title: Jester's Enchantments
description: A mod that adds some enchantments to minecraft 1.20.2
body:
# Jester's Enchantments
**A mod that adds enchantments to minecraft(Please go easy on me, this is my first mod)**

## Enchantments Added Currently(14)
- Flight - Boots - Gives Creative flight
- Life Force - Chest - Gives regeneration(1-3)
- Vitality - Chest - Gives a health boost(1-5)
- Lifesteal - Weapon - Heals player when hitting entity(1-3 hearts)
- Aqua Lung - Helmet - Gives infinite water breathing
- Withering - Weapon - Enemy is withered upon hit(1-3) - Mutually exclusive with Venomous
- Venomous - Weapon - Enemy is poisoned upon hit(1-3) - Mutually exclusive with Withering
- Ice Aspect - Weapon - Freezes enemy upon hit(4-8 seconds) - Mutually exclusive with Fire Aspect
- Smelting - Digging tool - Drops smelted version of item - Mutually exclusive with fortune & Silk touch
- Hurtle - Leggings - Gives Speed and Jump Boost(1-3)
- Blinding - Weapon - Blinds enemies on hit(1-3)
- Judgement - Weapon - Smites enemy on hit(1-2)
- Frenzy - Weapon - Gives strenght when enemy is killed(1-3)
- Second Chance(WIP)
- More to be added in future
